case_title: CHASE BANK USA, N.A., A CORPORATION VS. MARCIA E UBALDO et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A., A CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UBALDO, MARCIA E $6,637.19 PRINCIPAL, $565.53 INTEREST, $238.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,440.72, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT UBALDO, MARCIA E
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $238.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $750.00 AS TO DEFENDANT UBALDO, MARCIA E
DECLARATION RE: CCP 1033 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A., A CORPORATION
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $87.66 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A., A CORPORATION

DECLARATION OF RUBEN A. ALCARAZ RE: LOST ORIG. CONTRACT & WAIVER OF EXCESS INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A., A CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF RUBEN A. ALCARAZ RE: CCP 585 - IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A., A CORPORATION

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A., A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT UBALDO, MARCIA E DOES  1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-24-2009
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-24-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES  1 TO 10
